GET /api/v1/batches/B-RX2AF8 -> 200 full payload {batch_code,hatchery_id,hatchery_name,hatchery_contact,species,pl_grade,pcr{...,summary},pcr_certificate_url,valid_until,first_claimed_at,claimed_by_other}
no Authorization -> 401 {error:unauthorized}, x-correlation-id present
tampered signature -> 401 unauthorized
expired JWT -> 401 + header www-authenticate: Bearer error="token_expired"
code INVALID -> 400 {error:invalid_code_format}
well-formed unknown B-ZZZZZZ -> 404 {error:batch_not_found}
unpublished B-BC3SG6 -> 404 batch_not_found (identical to unknown, no draft leak)
expired batch B-KTQKN5 -> 410 {error:batch_expired,expired_at}

rows.Actual: after claim, GET B-TBBD3V -> claimed_by_other=true
40 parallel reqs -> 18x200 / 22x429 (token bucket cap10 refill10/s per iss)
x-correlation-id echoed when sent (uat-corr-123) and generated UUID when absent
POST /api/v1/auth/token valid client creds -> 200 {access_token(ES256),token_type:Bearer,expires_in:900}
wrong client_secret -> 401 {error:invalid_client}
pcr_certificate_url is a Supabase storage /object/sign/...?token=... signed URL (not /object/public/)
POST claim B-TBBD3V valid body -> 200 {ok:true,batch_code,claimed_at}
re-claim same correlation_id -> 200 same claimed_at (2026-05-17T12:02:45Z) ; DB shows 1 row, audit batch_claim_repeat
re-claim diff correlation_id same user -> 200 original claimed_at preserved; DB pond_id stayed 'pond-1' (NOT overwritten by pond-CHANGED), original correlation_id kept
different line_user_id -> 409 {error:claimed_by_other} no PII in body
missing pond_id -> 400 {error:invalid_body,field:pond_id}; bad line_user_id -> field:line_user_id (deterministic first-offending field)
expired batch claim -> 410 {error:batch_expired,expired_at}
unpublished batch claim -> 404 {error:batch_not_found}
batches.first_claimed_at = first claim claimed_at (2026-05-17T12:02:45.103627+00) after K3a
40 parallel claim reqs -> 12x200 / 28x429 (rate limit per iss)
missing JWT on claim -> 401 {error:unauthorized}
